## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #12 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I discussed non-trivial changes in an issue first
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `docs/USAGE.md`) if behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Modified files note that they were changed (Apache License §4b), where applicable
